title: PolyWeather
description: Change your weather in-game to way, way too many options.
body: # PolyWeather ![Dev Workflow Status](https://img.shields.io/github/v/release/Polyfrost/PolyWeather.svg?style=for-the-badge&color=1452cc&label=release) PolyWeather allows the user to (visually) change the in-game weather in various ways, such as setting it to the real weather, setting the intensity, and just setting the weather manually.
